Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Description: Reads your Doman Mahjong hand and either suggests the best discard or plays the match for you.
Changelog: v0.1.2.1: DiscardWeights re-tuned on the post-furiten, kabe/no-chance/tedashi-aware simulator under DomanRuleSet. The policy pursues hand value harder and folds isolated terminals more aggressively: Dora and Yakuhai weights jump roughly 7x and 8x, IsolatedTerminal 15x, DealInCost roughly 3x, with small shrinks to UkeireKinds and UkeireWeighted. Verification across three 1000-hand seeds shows +3, +82, +315 pts/hand vs the previous defaults (avg +133), consistent with selective push/fold and value pursuit.
